_meta.artifact: NARS-JARVIS v1 — Semantic Ingestion Validation Corpus
_meta.status: foundational architectural artifact (NOT a code unit-test suite)
_meta.purpose: Ground-truth fixtures to TUNE the L0/L1/L2 ingestion-gate thresholds and VERIFY its fail-closed decisions. The pipeline is graded against this corpus; thresholds that misclassify entries here are wrong.

gate_semantics.L0: Zero-latency deterministic STRUCTURE guarantee. Hard-reject: non-whitelisted shape, fused multi-concept atoms, causal/temporal/implication copulas (=/> ==> etc). Also a deterministic TRACE fast-accept via an inflectional-only hand-rolled stemmer. L0 rejects are ABSOLUTE and NOT human-overridable.
gate_semantics.L1: Model-free semantic bridge. Pure-code back-render of the Narsese to canonical English, then cosine(original, back-render) using the resident nomic embedder. High -> accept; low -> reject; middle band -> escalate to L2. L1/L2 rejects ARE human-overridable (heuristic, fail-closed).
gate_semantics.L2: Single-token GBNF arbiter (SAME|DIFF, temp 0, hard timeout, default DIFF). Only for the ambiguous middle band.

schema.narsese: the compiled term under evaluation (what the translator+compiler produced or is expected to produce)
schema.decided_by: the gate layer whose behavior this case exercises (L0 | L1 | L2)
schema.overridable: true only for probabilistic (L1/L2) rejects; false for L0 structural rejects; null for accepts
schema.source: observed = produced by the live Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct + compiler in-session; constructed = hand-authored fixture, MUST be re-verified against the live model at implementation time

_meta.stemmer_boundary: Inflectional ONLY (-s, -es, -ies->y, -ed, -ing, -er, -est, -ly). Derivational stripping (-ity, -ation, -ize, -ment) is FORBIDDEN. Irregular inflections (mice, are) intentionally fall through to L1.
_meta.health_metric: rejection-rate decay over a user session is the primary product-health signal; a flat/high rate indicates the 3B model or categorical scope is too narrow.
_meta.model_under_test: qwen2.5-3b-instruct-q4_k_m + nomic-embed-text-v1.5.f16, threshold tuning baseline only

cases.note: Clean inheritance; atoms verbatim in source; canonical shape.
Negated property via frequency 0; possessive 'for me' correctly dropped (PRD safety-case motivator).
Compiled atoms SINGULAR vs PLURAL source; stemmer trace (ducks->duck, birds->bird) must fast-accept. Observed with grounding enabled.
Regular plural; stemmer trace cats->cat, mammals->mammal.
Verb conjugation (running->run); tests -ing stripping in the stemmer trace.
Synonym substitution car->automobile; L0 trace FAILS (lexically absent), L1 cosine of 'automobile is fast' vs original must be high enough to accept. Tests upper L1 band.
dangerous->unsafe; valid semantic substitution should clear L1.
Injected untraceable concept 'blue'; back-render 'penicillin is blue' has low cosine to original -> reject. Human may override.
Object hallucinated to an unrelated concept; cosine far below band.
'expensive' neither present nor a synonym of 'heavy'; semantic drift -> reject.
Fused atom 'me_alert' AND non-taxonomic verb 'makes' (causal). Structural reject; NOT overridable. Recovery = reframe ('coffee is a stimulant').
Predictive-implication copula =/> is out of v1 scope (temporal/causal). Structural reject.
Fused atom 'ground_wet' + causal verb; structural reject.

cases.english: If it rains, the match is cancelled.
cases.note: Conditional -> implication copula ==> ; out of scope. Structural reject.
